creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 233479
update ausweisapp2 to 1.2.55

attached patch updates ausweisapp2 to the latest release (1.22.5 as of now) - the update itself is rather trivial (patch cosmetics).
Additionally, register a dependency on qt5-graphicaleffects, as without that package ausweisapp2 reports "qrc:/qml/main.qml:32:1: module "QtGraphicalEffects" is not installed" and shows no GUI.
